stories.title: Fix 'Current Plan: Basic' badge for users with no subscription
acceptance: Users with no subscription see 'No Active Plan' instead of 'Basic Plan' in header
Plan comparison cards do NOT show 'Current Plan' badge on Basic when user has no subscription
Basic card shows 'Get Started' button (not disabled 'Current Plan') when no subscription exists
Users on actual Basic plan still see 'Current Plan' badge correctly

stories.title: Fix contradictory plan card buttons and add 'no plan' state
acceptance: Users with no subscription see 'Get Started' on Basic card and 'Upgrade to Pro' on Pro card
Current plan stats section shows dashes for cost/cycle/next-billing when no subscription
No contradictory buttons visible at any time
'Upgrade to Pro' CTA in header only shows for users ON Basic (not users with no plan)

stories.title: Surface specific error messages from checkout edge function
acceptance: 403 from edge function shows 'You don't have permission to manage billing' toast
Generic errors show the actual error message from the response body, not 'Edge Function returned non-2xx'
Edge function membership check uses maybeSingle() instead of single() to avoid PGRST116 crash
